Seattle police shooting of pregnant woman justified: Inquest   SEATTLE — An inquest jury found Wednesday that two Seattle police officers were justified in fatally shooting a mentally unstable, pregnant, Black mother of four children inside her apartment when she menaced them with knives in 2017.
TRUE CRIME BYLINE: A politician murdered his ex-wife. We should have seen it coming   True Crime Byline is a new podcast by Postmedia and Antica Productions
Ex-NFLer and GOP candidate says automatic weapons are O-KKK!   The message from Jerone Davison? "Make Rifles Great Again."
'HOOKS ARE IN:' Edmonton dad says daughter was manipulated online before disappearance   Noah Madrano, 40, was arrested by FBI agents in Oregon a week after the girl was reported missing.

Passenger refused to don mask despite flight attendant warnings, court told   Lacombe, Alta. resident Courtney Douglas Sailer is charged with failing to comply with instructions of a crew member under the Canadian Aviation Regulations.

Pozuelo's move to the Sunshine State official as Reds pursue Bernardeschi   There’s no news like old news.
'HEARTBROKEN': Famed Dodgers vendor banned from tossing peanuts   The longtime practice of a peanut vendor at Dodgers Stadium has now been deemed a dangerous act.
Rafael Nadal has 7 mm abdominal tear: Report   Rafael Nadal has a 7-millimetre abdominal tear, Spanish newspaper Marca reported Thursday.
Start your Zamboni, Maple Leafs 2022-23 schedule released   Who knows what awaits the Maple Leafs in 2022-23?
Newest Raptor has a taste for championships now, and he's hungry for more   To date he’s the only new addition to this Raptors’ roster and Otto Porter Jr. couldn’t be happier about it.

Rafael Nadal vs Nick Kyrgios Picks: It's Kyrgios' Time to Shine   Nick Kyrgios is appearing in his first Grand Slam semifinal and is the favorite against Rafael Nadal, who is struggling to come to terms with an abdomen injury that flared up in his quarterfinal victory.

Novak Djokovic vs Cameron Norrie Picks: First-Time Semifinalist Seeks to Dethrone King   The contrasting tale of champion vs. contender plays out Friday on Centre Court, as Novak Djokovic and Cameron Norrie battle for a place in the Wimbledon final.

Blue Jays vs A's Picks and Predictions: Favourites Make Good   The Toronto Blue Jays and the Oakland A’s will wrap up their three-game series at RingCentral Coliseum with some afternoon baseball this Wednesday.

2022 NHL Draft Odds and Prop Picks: Slafkovsky Goes Right After Wright   The 2022 NHL Draft is here and several teams are looking to find a player who can provide immediate help in the upcoming season. The draft is a very exciting day for players, front offices, and fan bases, but it also comes with a ton of pressure.

Blue Jays vs A's Picks and Predictions: Will Kikuchi Let A's Stay Afloat?   The Toronto Blue Jays’ struggles followed them to the west coast as they dropped the opener of their series against the Oakland Athletics. The loss was the Blue Jays’ fourth in a row while the win was just the ninth all season for the A’s at home.

True Crime Byline: A Politician Murdered his Ex Wife. We Should Have Seen it Coming   Looking back on the murder of JoAnn Wilson today, what's most surprising is that we were surprised it happened at all.

True Crime Byline podcast: The Article that Blew Up a Murder Trial   Listen to this podcast episode for the shocking story of how a National Post article about a teen vampire led to a mistrial, as told by reporter Joseph Brean

Douglas Todd: Canadian cops far less likely to kill, or be killed, than U.S. counterparts   Analysis: Canadian police are often accused of using excessive force, but a U.S. officer is five times more likely than a Canadian cop to shoot and kill.

CRIME HUNTER: Times Square Killer linked to 1968 murder   During the day, Richard Cottingham would toil as a computer programmer in Manhattan, across the Hudson River from his suburban New Jersey home.

True Crime Byline: Families knew 'horrible creature' was taking Vancouver women long before police did   The DNA of 33 missing women was found on Robert Pickton's pig farm. But it's the story of the victims that stays with me, not the killer.
HAVE YOUR SAY: Answer our daily Toronto Sun poll question
EDITORIAL: The airport mess is a federal problem -- so fix it   It’s nothing short of outrageous that Canada’s airports and airlines remain an international disaster and laughingstock.
MBARKI: Indigenous Canadians need a federal leader like Pierre Poilievre   We need a federal political leader who pursues transparency and questions how money is spent

GOLDSTEIN: Here’s who gets what in Trudeau’s carbon tax rebates   On the theory of never looking a gift horse in the mouth, here’s what the Trudeau government’s new “climate action incentive payments” will mean for Canadians living in Ontario, Alberta, Saskatchewan and Manitoba.

ROSSI: Ontario needs swift action from the feds to help fill labour demand   As Canada’s premiers gather for their summer meeting next week in British Columbia, labour shortages will be top of mind for employers across the country.
Chris Hemsworth says he'll play Thor until fans tell him to quit   "I'll wait for the fans to say, 'No thanks, we've had enough of you,'" Marvel star says
Kesha had 'very sensual' experience, but not sex, with ghost   Kesha has admitted she never actually had sex with a ghost.
Chris Rock 'dating' actress Lake Bell   Chris Rock is dating actress Lake Bell, according to a new report.
'SHE SAID YES': Wolfgang Van Halen is engaged   Wolfgang Van Halen is engaged.
Ex-'Cheer' star Jerry Harris gets 12 years for sex crimes involving minors   Harris apologized to his victims, saying, "I am deeply sorry for all the trauma my abuse has caused you."
ASK AMY: Emotional cheating won’t lead to bounce-back   Dear Amy: Six months ago, my fiancee and I split up after 13 years together because of my emotional cheating.

Norwegian Cruise scraps COVID testing for select voyages   Passengers boarding Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings ships won’t have to take COVID-19 tests from next month unless required by local law, the U.S. cruise operator said on Wednesday as the crucial summer sailing season gathers steam.

ASK AMY: Family member needs non-binary primer   Dear Amy: My daughter (22 years old) came out as a non-binary last year, and I fully supported them (we use them/their pronouns now). They’ve been a lot happier since coming out.
I had a jam session at my home recently – and it was delicious!   While out grocery shopping recently, I noticed an abundance of cherries everywhere.
B.C. lodges say it is a good time to 'go fish'   B.C's coasts offer unrivalled fishing for wild Pacific salmon, halibut and ground fish running thousands of kilometres from north to south.

SUNshine Girl Erin   SUNshine Girl Erin loves cosy Italian cars and rap and R&B artists. The 5-foot-10, Sagittarius spends her downtime perusing through Instagram or hitting the club. (Ernest Doroszuk/Toronto Sun)

SUNshine Girl Shelby   SUNshine Girl Shelby, a 5-foot-3, brown-eyed Taurus, loves to play with her dogs. She's a big fan of Taylor Swift and also loves to sing, dance and play volleyball. (Toronto Sun/Postmedia Network)
SUNshine Girl Ally   SUNshine Girl Ally is a 5-foot-4 blue-eyed Libra. She loves to golf and listen to the Deftones, Motley Crue and Def Leppard. (Toronto Sun/Postmedia Network)

SUNshine Girl Lesonjia   SUNshine Girl Lesonjia is helping us hit another crescendo. The Virgo hip-hop artist likes writing music, wants to be an entertainer and is a hoops fan, especially with all things Raptors. (Toronto Sun)

SUNshine Girl Cephra   SUNshine Girl Cephra is a Libra who enjoys exploring cities, writing, studying and working out. When it's time to have fun, she says she likes to attend concerts. (Toronto Sun/Postmedia Network)
'I’m just a driver': Canadian women set course for F1 glory   Could a woman, say, become a member of the most exclusive racing club in the world? Nicole Havrda says that is the plan
Spied! 2023 Ford Super Duty XLT swipes feature from Chevy   The truck was spied in prototype form being put to work in Detroit—but is that a GM-style integrated step?
Mercedes strikes second-life battery pact with Canadian startup   It will supply used batteries from the automaker’s EVs to Vancouver-based Moment Energy Inc.
Watch: 15-year-old flips Jeep off cliff, reacts like a boss   Okay, but our hearts were beating pretty fast before that “Somebody better have gotten that on video!”
GTA Lamborghini driver nabbed at nearly 3X the speed limit   “..we never get tired of yanking stunt drivers off our roads.”
TikTok Tuesday: #healthycoke — a trend that’s not so healthy for your teeth (WATCH)   It may be low in sugar, but carbonated water mixed with vinegar is a terrible choice for your teeth.
Putting our phones on silent mode only makes them more tempting, study says   Blame FOMO for how hard it can be for us to stop looking at our phones all the time.

Justin Bieber 'did something very important for the facial difference community'   Advocate Alim Somji says the pop star challenges the typical images of facial difference portrayed in the media as villains, such as Scar from the movie The Lion King.

WATCH: We take our medications out of the bathroom thanks to this TikTok trend   A bathrooms isn't a great storage option for meds, as the swings in temperatures and moist conditions can cause them to lose potency.
What are the signs of pancreatitis?   Acute and chronic pancreatitis are typically diagnosed between the ages of 40 and 70, with men more likely to be diagnosed across all age groups.

Man's ploy to flush over 20 kilograms of cannabis down the toilet leads him straight to jail   Officers also found 21 kilograms of weed, additional bags of prepackaged marijuana, a handgun and over $16K in cash.

Joe Rogan responds to border drug seizure: ‘You should take all these drugs and rethink your life’   Border agents seized small amounts of ecstasy, cannabis and psilocybin mushrooms from a vehicle entering New York.
One of Canada's biggest universities will have a pot store on campus   The planned store would represent the pot company Burb's eighth and final one allowed in the province under its retail cap.
Ontario casinos laundered $3 million in illegal cannabis proceeds: RCMP   Weed worth approx. $24.8 million confiscated.
Clint Eastwood handed $2.6 million after winning a second trademark infringement CBD lawsuit   Company did not have permission to use his image or likeness.
